commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 30 June

NYSE maintains commanding liquidity superiority with an ILLIQ of just 0.0013 and Roll spread of 1.0491%, reflecting deep order books and tight execution costs. London Stock Exchange significantly lags at rank six, with ILLIQ nearly 120 times higher at 0.1518 and AR spread of 0.8937%, suggesting notably elevated transaction costs. The top four exchanges cluster tightly, while a sharp deterioration emerges beyond Xetra, indicating pronounced liquidity concentration in major US and continental European venues.
